title: Climate Change and the Cape & Islands: What We Know. What We Expect. What We Can Do.
summary: Professor John P. Holdren delivered the Geschke Lecture at the Nantucket Atheneum on Nantucket, Massachusetts, on July 30, 2018.
body: Note Professor John P. Holdren delivered the Geschke Lecture at the Nantucket Atheneum on Nantucket, Massachusetts, on July 30, 2018.
